name: RSS News
description: Displays live headlines from any RSS or Atom news feed.

schema.name: rss_url
schema.label: RSS / Atom Feed URL
schema.description: Full URL to the RSS or Atom feed you want to display.

schema.name: max_items
schema.label: Maximum Headlines
schema.description: Number of headlines to show at once (1-20).

schema.name: refresh_seconds
schema.label: Refresh Every (seconds)
schema.description: How often to re-fetch the feed in the background.

schema.name: loop
schema.label: Loop (stay on screen)
schema.description: Keep showing the RSS feed indefinitely without advancing.

schema.name: duration
schema.label: Duration (seconds)
schema.description: How long to show this plugin before advancing. Ignored when Loop is on.
